title: Wok-Fried Wholesome Tunisian Mung Bean Sprouts Hash
description: A buttery, juicy, and energizing Tunisian dish featuring mung bean sprouts, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the mung bean sprouts and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the chicken broth and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter, and stir until it has melted.
Add the cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper, and stir for 30 seconds.
Add the chopped parsley and stir for 30 seconds.
Transfer the mung bean sprouts mixture to a plate and set aside.
In the same wok, melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter over low heat.
Add the crispy chopped almonds and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the lemon juice and stir for 30 seconds.
Return the mung bean sprouts mixture to the wok and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 30 seconds, then serve immediately.
If the mixture seems dry, add a little water and stir to combine.
